notes: The design update: a living streak flame that stays grey until today's lesson is done and burns brighter as your streak grows (blue at 30 days, gold at 100), a confetti celebration when you complete a day — one day closer to fluency — a course journey map showing your road to the exam, subtle cultural textures per language (azulejo for Portuguese, šahovnica for Croatian), real icons in Settings, and a new editorial headline typeface.
